# Einleuchtplan Electron App - Setup Instructions

## Project Type
Electron Desktop Application for theater lighting plan management

## Requirements
- Electron app wrapper for existing HTML file
- Auto-save functionality to opened file
- File menu (Open, Save, Save As, Exit)
- Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux)
